keyEvents.text: Goal!  Panama 0, El Salvador 1. Brayan Gil (El Salvador) right footed shot from outside the box to the bottom right corner. Assisted by Mario González with a through ball.
Goal!  Panama 1, El Salvador 1. Fidel Escobar (Panama) header from the centre of the box to the bottom left corner. Assisted by Ismael Díaz   following a corner.
Cristian Martínez (Panama) is shown the yellow card for a bad foul.
First Half ends, Panama 1, El Salvador 1.
Second Half begins Panama 1, El Salvador 1.
Substitution, El Salvador. Christian Martínez replaces Joshua Pérez.
Substitution, Panama. Andrés Andrade replaces Hárold Cummings.
Substitution, Panama. Adalberto Carrasquilla replaces Cristian Martínez.
Adalberto Carrasquilla (Panama) is shown the yellow card for a bad foul.
